params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: 48차 perplexity V7-B per #697 verdict (V7-A modal DISMISSED but new failure: GET /rest/thread/blocked-{UUID} 400 Bad Request). V7-B drops 'blocked-' prefix → plain UUID thread_url_slug. Hypothesis: backend validation accepts UUID-only format, allowing thread doc fetch + bubble render.

test_steps: 2. Submit PII prompt — observe SSE response thread_url_slug (should now be UUID-only, no 'blocked-' prefix)
3. Network: GET /rest/thread/<UUID> — does it return 200 (success) or 400 (still rejected)?

verdict_criteria.OK: warning bubble visible + thread fetch 200 + no modal
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL_thread_404: thread fetch returns 404 (UUID not in DB) — escalate V7-C engine intercepts thread GET

notes: 48차 perplexity V7-B — drop blocked- prefix from thread_url_slug. Per #697 PARTIAL_modal_dismissed verdict.
